mapper.select: SELECT o.*, s.name as showName, t.name as ticketName, u.username as userName FROM biz_order o LEFT JOIN biz_show s ON o.show_id = s.id LEFT JOIN biz_ticket t ON o.ticket_id = t.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo}

SELECT o.*, s.name as showName, t.name as ticketName, u.username as userName FROM biz_order o LEFT JOIN biz_show s ON o.show_id = s.id LEFT JOIN biz_ticket t ON o.ticket_id = t.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.status = 0 AND o.expire_time < NOW() ORDER BY o.create_time ASC

SELECT o.*, s.name as showName, t.name as ticketName, u.username as userName FROM biz_order o LEFT JOIN biz_show s ON o.show_id = s.id LEFT JOIN biz_ticket t ON o.ticket_id = t.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON o.user_id = u.id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND o.show_id = #{showId} AND o.status IN (1, 4) ORDER BY o.pay_time DESC, o.create_time DESC
